hero.label: Guitar Lessons in Berlin
hero.heading:
Your Sound,
Your Journey
hero.desc: Personalized guitar lessons for kids and adults. Learn the music you love with a method that actually works.

about.label: Meet Your Teacher
about.heading: I Believe Every Student Has a Unique Musical Voice
about.p1: Hi, I'm Lucas — a guitar teacher based in Berlin with over 8 years of experience working with students of all ages. I fell in love with the guitar at a very young age, but only started playing and practicing as a teenager. After school, I studied Music Education and jazz guitar, played and recorded with a lot of different bands and musicians, and eventually turned my passion into a career helping others to discover theirs.
about.p2: Whether your child is picking up a guitar for the first time or you're an adult looking to finally learn that song you've always loved, I create lessons around what excites you. No rigid textbooks. No boring exercises. Just real music, real progress, and a lot of fun along the way.

forKidsPreview.heading: Guitar Lessons Your Kids Will Actually Love
forKidsPreview.desc: Structured, age-appropriate lessons that build confidence and creativity. From age 5 to 18, every student gets a personalized path that makes practice feel like play.
bullets: Real songs they love — not boring exercises
Stage confidence through gentle performance practice

items.quote: Lucas has a gift for making guitar feel accessible. My son went from zero to playing his favorite songs in just a few months.
items.author: Thomas H.

items.quote: The best guitar teacher in Berlin. His lessons are structured but never rigid — I always leave feeling inspired.
items.author: Andrea W.

items.quote: My daughter was shy about performing. After 6 months with Lucas, she played at her school concert. We couldn't be prouder.
items.author: Anna R.

finalCTA.label: Ready to Start?
finalCTA.heading: Your Musical Journey Begins With a Conversation
finalCTA.desc: Book a free, no-pressure meeting to discuss your goals. Whether it's for you or your child, let's find the right path together.

footer.tagline: Personalized guitar lessons for kids and adults in Berlin.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Lucas Terhaar Guitar. All rights reserved.

cookie.message: This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

hero.label: How I Teach
hero.heading: Every Student Gets Their Own Path
hero.desc: No cookie-cutter lessons. Whether you're 5 or 55, I adapt to your goals, your pace, and the music you love.

pillars.title: Student-Led Learning
pillars.desc: Your interests drive the lesson plan. We start with what excites you and build from there.

pillars.title: Real Music From Day One
pillars.desc: No months of scales before you play a song. You'll be making music from the very first lesson.

pillars.title: Small Wins Build Confidence
pillars.desc: Achievable goals every week. The more you succeed, the more you want to practice.

pillars.title: Learn By Doing
pillars.desc: Less theory lectures, more hands-on playing. The best way to learn guitar is to play guitar.

ageGroups.label: For Every Age
ageGroups.heading: Teaching That Adapts to Your Stage

groups.title: Little Musicians
groups.desc: Play-based exploration. Short exercises, fun songs, and building coordination through games.

groups.title: Foundation Builders
groups.desc: Structure meets fun. Chords, reading basics, real songs, and building a practice routine.

groups.title: Young Artists
groups.desc: Self-expression and style. Improvisation, songwriting, band skills, and performance prep.

groups.title: Adult Learners
groups.desc: It's never too late. Whether you're a total beginner or picking it back up, we go at your pace.

lessonStructure.label: Lesson Structure
lessonStructure.heading: What a Typical Lesson Looks Like

steps.title: Warm Up
steps.desc: Quick exercises to loosen fingers and get in the zone.

steps.title: Technique Focus
steps.desc: Targeted practice on a specific skill — chords, scales, picking.

steps.title: Song Work
steps.desc: Learn and practice a song you chose. This is the fun part.

steps.title: Creative Play
steps.desc: Improvisation, jam along, or explore something new.

steps.title: Review & Goals
steps.desc: What we accomplished, what to practice, and goals for next time.

items.quote: My daughter was nervous about starting. After the first lesson with Lucas, she couldn't stop talking about it. Now she practices every day without me asking.
items.author: Maria S.

items.quote: We tried two other teachers before Lucas. The difference is night and day. He actually listens to what the kids want to play.
items.author: Jens & Katrin W.

items.quote: My son played at his school concert after 4 months of lessons. I cried. Lucas gave him the confidence to get on that stage.
items.author: Christina L.

items.a: Lessons are available in 30, 45, and 60 minutes. I recommend 30 or 45 minutes for most students. 60-minute sessions are also available on request.

items.q: Does my child need their own guitar?
items.a: Not for the first lesson — I have instruments available. For regular lessons, I recommend getting a guitar. I can help you choose the right one for your child's age and size.
Ages 5-8: Just play for fun! Ages 9-12: 10-15 minutes daily. Ages 13-18: 20-30 minutes daily. Adults: whatever fits your schedule. Practice should feel like play, not a chore.
Life gets busy — I get it. Cancel more than 3 days ahead and there's no charge at all. Within 2 days, 50% of the lesson fee applies. Within 24 hours, the full fee is charged.

items.q: Can parents sit in on lessons?
items.a: For children ages 5-8, parents may sit in for the first 3 lessons. After that, the child attends independently. We'll figure out what works.

cta.heading: Let's Find the Right Path for You
cta.desc: Book a free, no-pressure meeting. We'll talk about what you want to learn and I'll create a plan just for you.

hero.label: Pricing
hero.heading: Invest in Your Musical Future
hero.desc: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Every lesson is personalized, every session is progress.

items.title: Personalized Lesson Plan
items.desc: Every lesson built around your goals, not a generic curriculum.

items.title: Technique + Theory + Songs
items.desc: A balanced approach that covers everything you need.

items.title: Practice Guidance
items.desc: Clear direction between lessons so you always know what to work on.

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.desc: Book lessons when it works for you. Easy rescheduling.

testimonialStrip.quote: Worth every euro. Lucas's lessons have transformed my daughter's relationship with music.

single.title: Single Lesson
single.desc: Flexible, pay-as-you-go lessons with full personalization.

pack12.title: 12-Lesson Package
pack12.desc: Commit to progress with a discounted package.

trial.title: Trial Lesson
trial.desc: A no-pressure introduction to see if we're a good fit.

comparison.label: Compare
comparison.heading: Which Option Is Right for You?

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Bank transfer, PayPal, and cash. Payment is due before each lesson or at the start of a package.

items.q: Can I switch between 45 and 60 minute lessons?
items.a: Absolutely. You can choose your session length each time you book. Many students start with 45 and move to 60 as they get more into it.

items.q: What happens if I need to cancel?
items.a: Life gets busy — I get it. Cancel more than 3 days ahead and there's no charge at all. Within 2 days, 50% of the lesson fee applies. Within 24 hours, the full fee is charged.
12-lesson packages are valid for 4 months from purchase. This gives you plenty of flexibility while maintaining momentum.

items.q: Is the trial lesson really free?
items.a: Yes! It's a free, no-pressure get-to-know-each-other session. We'll talk about your goals and see if we're a good fit.

items.q: Do you offer discounts for siblings?
items.a: Yes — if two or more siblings take lessons, I offer a 10% family discount on all sessions.

cta.heading: Not Sure Yet? Let's Talk.
cta.desc: Book a free meeting — no commitment, no pressure. Just a conversation about your musical goals.

hero.label: Contact
hero.heading: Let's Start a Conversation
hero.desc: Tell us a bit about yourself and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized plan.

options.label: Adult (18+)
options.desc: It's never too late to start or improve

options.label: Some Experience
options.desc: Knows a few chords or songs

info.locationDesc: Teaching across Berlin — home visits and studio sessions available.

cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
cta.desc: The first step is always a conversation.

hero.label: For Kids & Parents
hero.heading: Guitar Lessons Your Kids Will Love
hero.desc: Parent-friendly lessons designed for ages 5-18. Structured, encouraging, and built around what your child enjoys.

whyMusic.label: Why Music
whyMusic.heading: More Than Just an Instrument
whyMusic.desc: Learning guitar builds skills that go far beyond music.

benefits.title: Focus & Discipline
benefits.desc: Regular practice builds concentration and self-discipline — skills that translate to school and life.

benefits.title: Confidence
benefits.desc: Performing, even just for family, teaches kids they can do hard things. That belief carries them far.

benefits.title: Creativity
benefits.desc: Music is one of the best outlets for creative expression. It gives kids a voice beyond words.

benefits.title: A Lifelong Skill
benefits.desc: Unlike most hobbies, guitar stays with you forever. It's a gift they'll keep long after childhood.

ageGroups.label: Age Groups
ageGroups.heading: Every Age Has Its Own Path

groups.title: Little Musicians
groups.desc: Play-based learning with short, focused exercises. We use games, simple songs, and lots of encouragement. Sessions are 30 minutes to match attention spans. Parents can sit in.
bullets: First songs in the first lesson
Fun rhythm games and coordination exercises
No pressure, no homework — just musical play

groups.title: Foundation Builders
groups.desc: This is where real progress happens. Students learn proper technique, basic theory, and start playing the songs they love. We introduce a light practice routine and set weekly goals.
bullets: Songs they actually want to play

groups.title: Young Artists
groups.desc: Teens want independence and self-expression. We dive into style, improvisation, and performance skills. Whether they're in a school band or learning for fun, lessons adapt to their goals.

skills.title: Proper Technique
skills.desc: Correct posture, hand position, and picking — building good habits from day one.

skills.title: Reading Basics
skills.desc: Tabs, chord diagrams, and basic notation — enough to learn any song independently.

skills.title: Real Songs
skills.desc: Songs they choose and love. This is what keeps kids motivated to practice.

skills.title: Rhythm & Timing
skills.desc: Strumming patterns, counting, and playing in time — the foundation of good music.

skills.title: Music Theory
skills.desc: Age-appropriate theory that makes sense. Not boring worksheets — practical understanding.

skills.title: Stage Confidence
skills.desc: Gentle performance practice. From playing for family to school concerts.

firstLesson.label: First Lesson
firstLesson.heading: What to Expect on Day One
firstLesson.desc: No pressure, no tests, just music.

steps.title: Meet Lucas
steps.desc: A friendly introduction. We talk about what your child likes, their experience, and what they want to learn.

steps.title: Try the Guitar
steps.desc: Your child picks up the guitar (I have instruments if needed). We explore sounds, strings, and what feels comfortable.

steps.title: Play a Simple Tune
steps.desc: By the end of the first lesson, most kids play a recognizable melody. This is the 'aha' moment.

steps.title: Set Goals Together
steps.desc: We discuss a fun plan for the coming weeks. Parents get a clear picture of what to expect.

ageGroups.label: For Every Age
ageGroups.heading: Teaching That Adapts to Your Stage

groups.title: Little Musicians
groups.desc: Play-based exploration. Short exercises, fun songs, building coordination and confidence through games.

groups.title: Foundation Builders
groups.desc: Structure meets fun. Learning chords, reading basics, playing real songs, building a practice routine.

groups.title: Young Artists
groups.desc: Self-expression and style. Band skills, improvisation, songwriting, preparing for performances.

groups.title: Adult Learners
groups.desc: It's never too late. Whether you're a total beginner or picking it back up, we go at your pace.

items.title: Electric Guitar
items.desc: From classic rock to jazz fusion — explore distortion, effects, and techniques that define your sound.

items.title: Acoustic Guitar
items.desc: Fingerpicking, strumming, and songwriting. The most versatile instrument and the foundation of it all.

items.title: Bass Guitar
items.desc: The backbone of every band. Learn groove, rhythm, slap technique, and how to hold everything together.

items.title: Ukulele
items.desc: Fun, portable, and the perfect entry point. Great for young beginners and anyone who wants to play quickly.
